---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Transity
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing.

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. For example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Expected Impact
How would this feature benefit the project and its users? Would it address any current limitations?

## Implementation Ideas
If you have any ideas on how this might be implemented, share them here. Include technical considerations or architecture changes if applicable.

## Mockups & Examples
If applicable, add mockups, diagrams, or examples from other projects to help illustrate the feature.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
